g.text: 3D Data Quality Framework \u00b7 DQ Rule User Journey
Discover \u2192 Create \u2192 Validate \u2192 Review \u2192 Approve \u2192 Deploy \u2192 Monitor \u2192 Improve
filter by market, brand, date, column
\u2461 CREATE \u00b7 Propose a New DQ Rule
Type rule request in natural language
"Create a null check for customer_email in gold.customer"
Review proposal \u2192 choose A / B / C
Submitted -- monitor status in DQ Chatbot App
Invoke DQ Backend App via UC tool
Map request to known DQ check catalog
Generate rule draft for check type
Syntax \u00b7 Schema \u00b7 Cost estimate \u00b7 Partition alignment
Similarity vs active rules in anomaly_check_config
Coverage + signal quality compound over time.
rule definition \u00b7 trend score \u00b7 blast radius
